data.title: [plugin-portability]: __pycache__/*.pyc files under plugins/dso/ contain stale plugins/dso refs in bytecode
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Stale __pycache__/*.pyc files under plugins/dso/scripts/ and plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/ contain compiled bytecode that includes plugins/dso string literals from previously-compiled Python scripts. These show up in grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/ and would cause the S4 enforcement hook to fail until cleaned.

## Steps to Reproduce
grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/ | grep __pycache__

## Expected Behavior
No __pycache__ files should be tracked in git. Add __pycache__/ and *.pyc to .gitignore under plugins/dso/.

## Actual Behavior
10+ .pyc files under plugins/dso/ match the plugins/dso grep pattern.
